ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of financial period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial period */,
  "is_closed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the period is closed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholders_equity" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholders' equity entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "ordinary_shares" TEXT /* Value of ordinary shares */,
  "additional_paid_in_capital" TEXT /* Value of additional paid-in capital */,
  "accumulated_deficit" TEXT /* Value of accumulated deficit */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total value of shareholders' equity */,
  "beginning_balance" TEXT /* Balance at the beginning of the period */,
  "ending_balance" TEXT /* Balance at the end of the period */,
  "net_income_loss" TEXT /* Net income or loss for the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shareholders' equity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the shareholders' equity entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholders_equity_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial component */,
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shareholders' equity entry */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of financial component (e.g., net loss, adjustment to ordinary shares) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the financial component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_components_equity_id FOREIGN KEY ("equity_id") REFERENCES shareholders_equity ("equity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
